name: Piyapat Wawseengam
title: Software Developer
tagline: Software Developer with Game Design background, experienced in building business web apps, logistics integrations, and gameplay systems from prototype to playable product.
about: I am a software developer with a Game Design background and hands-on experience across business software and game development. In business systems, I build web applications, Windows applications, logistics integrations, and reporting tools using C#, JavaScript, SQL, jQuery, and FastReport. In game projects, I have written gameplay code for tower customization, pathfinding, party selection, turn-based battle flow, dialog systems, UI flow, multiplayer payloads, inventory, quests, and database-connected features. I am strongest when a task needs practical problem solving, debugging, and turning unclear requirements into working systems that people can actually use.
